intro:
I couldn't find any information on a plant called "Rosa aunisiensis." However, I found some information on "Rosa alnifolia", which might be what you're referring to. 

Rosa alnifolia is a species of rose that is native to the Himalayas and is also known as the "Himalayan rose". It is a shrub-like plant that is valued for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Rosa alnifolia include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The most common herbal preparations made with Rosa alnifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
